<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below. Remove any
sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changed and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change with no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adds or improves tests
- [ ] chore — build, CI, tooling, deps
- [ ] perf — performance improvement

## Related issues

<!-- "Closes #123", "Refs #456", or "n/a". -->

## How was this tested?

<!--
- Unit tests added/updated (where + what they cover)
- Manual steps (route, env, expected result)
- Skipped tests + reason
-->

## Screenshots / output

<!-- Required for any UI change. Paste images, gifs, or terminal output. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or production data in the diff
- [ ] `docs/STATUS.md` updated if a surface, route, or package changed
- [ ] `docs/GBRAIN_HANDOFF.md` updated if GBrain schema or RPCs changed
- [ ] New env vars added to `apps/web/.env.example` (value-less)
- [ ] Migrations are reversible or have a documented rollback
